synthesis:
## Decision

Adopt the Benthic Protocol in coordination with Operation Clearsky. The Apollo Framework remains in play.

## Action Items

- Deploy Benthic Protocol
- Execute Operation Clearsky
- Retain Apollo Framework

turns.speaker: Alice
turns.content: I recommend the Apollo Framework. It handles the deep-sea mining case well.

turns.speaker: Bob
turns.content: Apollo Framework is fine. We need something for atmospheric monitoring though.
